findings.summary: Board size DFM violation correctly detected (128x55mm exceeds 100x100mm JLCPCB tier)
findings.details: The PCB is 128.0x55.0mm. The DFM analyzer correctly flags this as exceeding the 100x100mm standard tier.

findings.summary: 3-phase BLDC inverter bridge not detected -- bridge_circuits and transistor_circuits both empty
findings.details: The design has 6 IRF150P220XKMA1 power MOSFETs (Q1-Q6) arranged as three half-bridge pairs driven by three IR2112 gate drivers. Neither the bridge topology nor the individual MOSFET switch circuits are detected.

findings.summary: 9 UF4004 flyback diodes not detected as protection devices
findings.details: The motor controller has 9 UF4004 fast-recovery diodes (D1-D9) as flyback/freewheeling diodes for the MOSFET switches and bootstrap circuits. protection_devices=[] despite all 9 diodes being present.

findings.summary: Empty stub PCB file correctly parsed without error -- all statistics return zero
findings.details: The .kicad_pcb file is a two-line stub with no board content. The analyzer correctly handles this gracefully.
